name: Una 12x24 Gambrel Roof Shed Plan - Spacious Barn-Style Storage & Workshop
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a gambrel roof that maximizes interior height and supports optional loft storage.
Ideal for workshops, lawn equipment, ATVs, motorcycles, or multi-purpose storage with room to organize efficiently.
Barn-style double doors make it easy to move in large tools, workbenches, riding mowers, and bulky materials.
Vertical wood siding, clean trim, decorative exterior lighting, and a bold gambrel roof create a strong, enduring visual presence.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Una Gambrel Roof Shed Plan - a 12x24 barn-style storage and workspace solution designed for maximum interior volume, durability, and timeless curb appeal. Featuring a classic gambrel roof, rich wood siding, stone-inspired lower cladding, and wide barn-style double doors, the Una delivers traditional character with modern, everyday functionality. Whether you're building a full-scale workshop, equipment shed, hobby barn, or high-capacity storage spa...
